synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0251 Important: Oracle Linux 7 libpng security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0251

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0251.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libpng-1.5.13-8.0.1.el7.i686.rpm
libpng-1.5.13-8.0.1.el7.x86_64.rpm
libpng-devel-1.5.13-8.0.1.el7.i686.rpm
libpng-devel-1.5.13-8.0.1.el7.x86_64.rpm
libpng-static-1.5.13-8.0.1.el7.i686.rpm
libpng-static-1.5.13-8.0.1.el7.x86_64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/libpng-1.5.13-8.0.1.el7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-64720




Description of changes:

[2:1.5.13-8.0.1]
- Fix CVE-2025-64720 [Orabug: 38824465]
